metadata.title: WFlows — AI-Powered Revenue & Operations Systems
metadata.description: We build AI-powered systems for outbound pipeline, inbound capture, and operational automation. Done for you in 30 days.

hero.title: AI-powered systems for revenue and operations
hero.subtitle: for growing businesses that are done with manual work
hero.description: We combine AI workflows with hands-on expertise to build end-to-end systems — from outbound pipeline generation to inbound lead capture to operational automation. Done for you.

steps.title: Discovery & Architecture
steps.description: We map your current stack, workflows, and goals. You get a system design document.

steps.title: Build & Integrate
steps.description: We build your automations, connect your tools, and configure AI agents.

steps.title: Test & Launch

steps.title: Optimize & Handoff

industries.title: Built for your industry
industries.subtitle: Every business is different. We build systems that speak your language.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most systems are live within 4 weeks. We start with a strategy call to understand your needs, then build and launch in structured weekly phases.

items.question: Do I need to replace my current tools?
items.answer: No. We work with your existing stack — HubSpot, Salesforce, Make, n8n, Instantly, and dozens more. We integrate and enhance, not replace.

items.question: What if I only need outbound (or only inbound)?
items.answer: That's fine. Our services are modular. You can start with one system and expand later. Most clients start with outbound or inbound and add operations over time.

items.question: Do I own the systems you build?
items.answer: Yes, 100%. Everything runs in your accounts, on your tools. We build it, you own it. No vendor lock-in.

items.question: How is this different from hiring a VA or an agency?
items.answer: VAs do manual work. Agencies run campaigns for you. We build systems that run themselves. You get infrastructure, not headcount.

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We specialize in dental, legal, home services, logistics, construction, financial services, and B2B SaaS. But our systems work for any service business with a sales process.

items.question: What does pricing look like?
items.answer: We offer tiered packages starting from a single system build. Book a strategy call for exact pricing based on your needs.

finalCta.title: Ready to build systems that run without you?
finalCta.description: Book a free strategy call. We'll map your current workflows and show you exactly what we'd build.

comparison.title: This isn't another email blast service

items.question: What tools do you use?
items.answer: Clay for enrichment, Instantly or Smartlead for email, HeyReach or Expandi for LinkedIn, and your CRM for pipeline tracking. We work with your existing stack or set up what's needed.

items.question: How many emails/messages per month?
items.answer: Depends on your ICP size and campaign strategy. Typical setups handle 5,000-20,000 personalized touchpoints per month across channels.

items.question: Do you write the copy?
items.answer: Yes. We write all campaign copy — subject lines, email sequences, LinkedIn messages. AI-assisted, human-reviewed for quality.

items.question: How do you avoid spam?
items.answer: Dedicated domains, proper warmup, SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup, sending limits, and content optimization. Deliverability is built into the infrastructure.

items.question: Can you work with our existing CRM?
items.answer: Yes. We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, and most major CRMs. Everything syncs automatically.

items.question: How is this different from using Clay/Instantly directly?
items.answer: Those are tools. We build the system — strategy, infrastructure, campaigns, optimization, and reporting. You get a complete outbound engine, not just software.

cta.title: Ready to build your outbound pipeline?
cta.description: Book a strategy call to see if automated outbound systems are right for your business.

hero.title: Build your outbound pipeline — without hiring more SDRs
hero.subtitle: We build AI-powered GTM systems that find, enrich, and engage your ideal customers — multi-channel, signal-based, fully done for you. Live in 14 days.

problem.title: Your GTM stack is broken. Here's how you know.
problem.heroMetric: B2B companies using signal-based outbound see 3-5x higher reply rates than generic campaigns.
items: "We've tried cold email — everything lands in spam."
"Our SDR spends all day researching instead of selling."
"We have Clay / Instantly / Apollo but can't make them work together."

steps.title: Audit & Define
steps.description: We audit your GTM stack and define your ICP with precision.

steps.title: Build Infrastructure
steps.description: We build your outbound infrastructure — tools, domains, enrichment pipelines.

steps.title: Launch Campaigns
steps.description: We launch signal-based campaigns across email + LinkedIn.

items.meaning: Reach out when they're ready to buy

guarantee.title: Our guarantee
guarantee.text: If the pilot doesn't generate qualified replies within 30 days, you don't pay.

socialProof.title: Industry benchmarks
socialProof.text: B2B companies using signal-based outbound with Clay report 4-8 meetings booked per 100 signals detected.

items.question: What tools do you use?
items.answer: Clay for enrichment, Instantly or Smartlead for email, HeyReach or Expandi for LinkedIn, your CRM for pipeline. We work with your existing stack or set up what's needed.

items.question: How is this different from hiring an SDR?
items.answer: An SDR costs $70K+/year, needs 3 months to ramp, and can only personalize ~30 emails/day. Our systems send thousands of personalized messages, detect buying signals automatically, and book meetings while your team focuses on closing.

items.question: How many meetings can I expect?
items.answer: Depends on your ICP, market size, and offer. Typical results for signal-based campaigns: 3-8 meetings per 100 signals detected. We'll give you realistic projections during the strategy call.

items.question: Do I need Clay / Instantly already?
items.answer: No. We set up everything. Tool costs are separate (typically $300-$800/month total for the full stack).
